modules.title: Reporting Requirements (Product, Annual, Supplemental)
modules.description: Comprehensive coverage of FDA reporting requirements including Product Reports, Supplemental Reports, and Annual Reports under 21 CFR Part 1002.

interactive_components.name: Report Type Selector
interactive_components.description: Interactive decision tree for determining required report type

interactive_components.name: Timeline Calculator
interactive_components.description: Calculate reporting deadlines based on product introduction dates

interactive_components.name: Compliance Scenarios
interactive_components.description: Multi-step scenario exercises for reporting situations

interactive_components.name: Report Checklist
interactive_components.description: Interactive checklist of required report elements

modules.title: Variance Applications
modules.description: Complete guide to FDA variance application procedures including Form FDA 3147 for demonstration lasers and alternate labeling/performance requests.

interactive_components.name: Variance Type Selector
interactive_components.description: Explore different variance types and requirements

interactive_components.name: Form 3147 Simulator
interactive_components.description: Step-through of variance application form completion

interactive_components.name: Variance Decision Flow
interactive_components.description: Determine if variance is needed for a situation

modules.title: Incident Reporting & State-Federal Jurisdiction
modules.description: Coverage of incident reporting requirements and the division of jurisdiction between FDA, OSHA, and state radiation control programs.

interactive_components.name: Jurisdiction Mapper
interactive_components.description: Visual diagram of FDA/OSHA/State jurisdiction boundaries

interactive_components.name: Incident Guide
interactive_components.description: Determine reporting requirements by incident type

interactive_components.name: Incident Scenarios
interactive_components.description: Test knowledge with realistic incident scenarios

interactive_components.name: Reporting Timeline
interactive_components.description: Reporting deadlines for different incident types

alternative_paths.name: Fast Track
alternative_paths.note: Module 2.5 required only if working with demonstration lasers

certification.certificate_title: FDA Compliance - Reporting and Incident Management
